scripts.type-check: cd arcadia-ts && tsc --noEmit && cd ../templates/spinfall-arena && tsc --noEmit && cd ../downleaf && tsc --noEmit && cd ../cipher-room && tsc --noEmit
scripts.spinfall: wasm-pack build arcadia-rs --target web && cd templates/spinfall-arena && bun run dev
scripts.downleaf: wasm-pack build arcadia-rs --target web && cd templates/downleaf && bun run dev
scripts.cipher-room: wasm-pack build arcadia-rs --target web && cd templates/cipher-room && bun run dev
scripts.format: bun format:rs && bun format:spinfall-arena && bun format:downleaf && bun format:cipher-room
scripts.lint: bun lint:rs && bun lint:spinfall-arena && bun lint:downleaf && bun lint:cipher-room
scripts.qa: bun type-check && bun lint && bun format &&  bun run test
